name: CrystalStructure_validate
description: Validate crystal structure by computing theoretical density from unit cell parameters (a, b, c in Angstroms; alpha, beta, gamma in degrees), Z (formula units per cell), and molecular weight (g/mol). Compares against an optional reported density and flags deviations >1% (warning) or >5% (mismatch). Auto-detects crystal system (cubic, tetragonal, orthorhombic, hexagonal, trigonal, monoclinic, triclinic). Uses V = abc*sqrt(1 - cos2a - cos2b - cos2g + 2*cos(a)*cos(b)*cos(g)) and d = Z*MW/(V*Na). Angles default to 90 degrees; b and c default to a for cubic systems.

a.description: Unit cell parameter a in Angstroms

b.description: Unit cell parameter b in Angstroms (defaults to a)

c.description: Unit cell parameter c in Angstroms (defaults to a)

alpha.description: Unit cell angle alpha in degrees (default 90)

beta.description: Unit cell angle beta in degrees (default 90)

gamma.description: Unit cell angle gamma in degrees (default 90)

Z.description: Number of formula units per unit cell

reported_density.description: Optional reported density in g/cm^3 to compare against
